# skills

Index of reusable skill notes for the dashboard project.

## Naming convention
Use lowercase snake_case filenames for all skill notes (easy to remember and retype).

## Current skills
- `code_new_use_case.md` — process for planning and implementing new use cases.
- `code_update.md` — conventions for updating existing code.
- `create_new_test_procedure.md` — workflow for adding new tests.
- `update_errors_table.md` — process for maintaining error tracking artifacts.
- `vs_code_setup.md` — editor/workspace setup guidance.
